studyName: Genomic Basis of Phenotypic Variability of Complex Disorders

tables.description: This children subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, race, age, presence or absence of the 16p12.1 deletion, ADHD, aggressive behavior, anxiety, autism spectrum disorder, bipolar disorder, depression, developmental delay, epilepsy or seizures, hallucinations or delusions, intellectual disability, learning difficulties in school, motor delay, paranoia, self-injurious behavior, sleep disturbance, speech delay, cardiac defects, digestive tract abnormalities, dysmorphic facial features, failure to thrive, gonadal defects, growth delay, hearing impairment, hypotonia or weak muscle tone, kidney or urinary tract defects, microcephaly, brain morphological or MRI-detected abnormalities, muscle system abnormalities, obesity, skeletal system abnormalities, and vision impairment.
